feature1: Understand your spending habits at a glance with colorful charts and trends. See exactly where your money goes each month so you can adjust budgets and save more effectively.
feature2: Track all household expenses, local utility bills, international subscriptions, or vacation costs, automatically converted and organized in your preferred currency.
feature3: Create personalized categories like ‘Groceries’ or ‘Kids’ for ultra detailed budgeting. Adapt to your lifestyle, not the other way around.
feature4: Lost a receipt? Search transactions by date, amount or custom notes, find anything in seconds, without scrolling endlessly.
feature5: Never lose track of money owed. Easily record and manage both money you lend and debts you owe. Set due dates, add automatic reminders, and maintain a clear history for every transaction. Never miss a payment or collection again.
feature6: Record real-world currency exchanges. Our system adapts to informal markets. Simply enter the currencies, amount, and the exchange rate you used. The system automatically creates the corresponding income and expense transactions in each currency, accurately reflecting your actual money movement.
feature7: Share access, maintain control. Perfect for families or teams. Create users, assign custom roles (like 'View Only' or 'Editor'), and define what each person can see and do. Security and privacy come first.
feature8: Say goodbye to manual categorization. Define default category and subcategory combinations. When creating a transaction, the system will automatically suggest the right classification, saving you time and ensuring consistency.
title: Take Control of Your Finances – Track Expenses Effortlessly
subtitle: A simple, powerful way to manage household spending and save more money.
